name: Sour Cream Drops
recipeInstructions:
Mix margarine, sugar, and eggs. Stir in sour cream and vanilla. Sift dry ingredients together and stir into the cream mixture. Cover. Chill at least 1 hour.
Drop by teaspoon 2 inches apart on ungreased pan. Bake until delicately brown. They should be light with no fingerprint when touched lightly.
Frosting: Mix sugar, milk, vanilla extract, and salt. Melt margarine and chocolate together. Add to the sugar mixture and stir until thick. Spread over cooled cookies. Do not make icing ahead of time.
